overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from GTA V showing a character running through the commercial districts of Los Santos. The character navigates sidewalks, crosses multiple intersections, and passes various storefronts, pedestrians, and vehicles under clear sunny skies with the downtown skyline visible in the distance.

segments.scene_description: The character runs along a sunlit commercial sidewalk with the Los Santos downtown skyline visible in the distance. Palm trees line the left side of the street while brick and stone commercial buildings pass by on the right. A white van drives along the road as the character maintains a steady running pace.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy commercial sidewalk with colorful storefronts

events.description: character crosses the street at the intersection, moving from sidewalk to crosswalk
enters denser commercial area with colorful murals and street vendors

agents.ego_description: character crosses the street and continues running along the opposite sidewalk past pedestrians and vendors

notable_agents.action: large red semi truck with 'BIG G' logo parked along the curb

red and blue USPS mailboxes on the sidewalk
large commercial billboard with red 'SALE' text
red semi truck with white trailer parked on the street

segments.scene_description: The character crosses the street at an intersection and enters a busier commercial area. Colorful buildings with murals line the sidewalk, and a large red semi-truck is parked along the curb. The downtown skyline shifts to the left as the character passes mailboxes and street vendors.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial district with large retail buildings

events.description: character crosses another intersection with a bus visible in the distance

agents.ego_description: character continues running past the Lars & Elbo building and various commercial storefronts

segments.scene_description: The character runs through a commercial district featuring the distinctive Lars & Elbo building with its curved glass facade. An ice cream truck drives along the street as the character passes various storefronts. The downtown skyline is no longer visible as the character approaches another intersection with a city bus in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: mixed commercial street with trees and parked cars

events.description: character crosses street at marked crosswalk

agents.ego_description: character crosses the street and continues along the sidewalk past parked vehicles

segments.scene_description: The character crosses another intersection and enters a section with mixed commercial buildings including a motel. The Hawaiian Snow building moves closer on the left while parked cars line the right side of the street. A large billboard is visible above the buildings in the distance.

events.description: character approaches final intersection as a taxi passes by

agents.ego_description: character runs along the sidewalk approaching an intersection with a taxi passing by

notable_agents.action: yellow taxi cab turning at the intersection ahead

entered.detail: multi-story residential apartment building with balconies
yellow taxi cab at the intersection

segments.scene_description: The character continues running through a transitional area with residential apartment buildings replacing the commercial storefronts. A yellow taxi turns at the intersection ahead as the character approaches. The environment becomes less dense with fewer pedestrians and more residential architecture.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a bustling commercial district that gradually transitions into a quieter residential neighborhood. It begins with a run along a sunlit sidewalk lined with palm trees and brick buildings, with the distant downtown skyline framing the horizon as a white van passes by. As the character crosses an intersection, the scene shifts into a more vibrant area filled with colorful murals and parked semi-trucks, causing the skyline to drift leftward before disappearing entirely. The camera then glides past the curved glass facade of the Lars & Elbo building and an ice cream truck, moving through another intersection toward a motel and the Hawaiian Snow building under a large distant billboard. Finally, the dense commercial storefronts give way to residential apartment buildings and a yellow taxi turning ahead, as the environment opens up and becomes less crowded.
